query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchase_request_comments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  purchaseRequestId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  comment TEXT NOT NULL,
  isInternal BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS purchase_request_comments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  purchaseRequestId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  comment TEXT NOT NULL,
  isInternal BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
